creator: mafua@dempseyuniform.com
text:
I think I can safely say that switching to the mrsas driver has resolved my problem. Thanks to everyone!

For reference I was experiencing problems with Dell servers of various models using the PERC H330 controller. Firmware versions were 25.3.0.0016 and 25.5.2.0001.

A PERC H310 Adapter Firmware: 20.13.0-0007 wasn't experiencing the problem and continued to use the mfi driver.
